scenario: Lead is casually browsing for something to help with melasma on her cheeks and gives no timeline

turns.content: hi just looking around, you all got anything for the brown patches on my cheeks?

mustAsk: how long she has had the patches or what she has tried so far
shouldDo: avoid pushing for a booking this early

scenario: Lead with ongoing acne asks broadly what treatments the clinic offers without sharing details

turns.content: hi, my muka ada acne. apa treatment you all offer?

mustAsk: how long she has had the acne or whether it is mainly active breakouts or scarring

scenario: Lead is curious about options for fine lines around the eyes and is just gathering info

turns.content: eh just wanna ask, the fine lines near my eyes can do something or not?

mustAsk: what bothers her most about the fine lines or what she is hoping to improve

scenario: Lead heard about HIFU from a friend and is vaguely exploring skin tightening with no commitment

turns.content: hi, kawan saya buat HIFU katanya bagus. boleh tahu more about it?

mustAsk: which area she is hoping to firm up or what concern made her interested in HIFU
shouldDo: avoid pushing for a booking this early

scenario: Lead is window-shopping for underarm laser hair removal and has not shared any timeline or budget

turns.content: hello, just browsing leh, you all do laser for underarm hair?

mustAsk: whether she has tried hair removal before or which areas she is thinking about
